terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Pickled Pirates Racing is a private member site for events, products, and the Swap Meet. By using the site, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: Swap Meet
sections.body: The Swap Meet is user-posted listings for car parts only. We do not verify listings, broker deals, or provide messaging. All transactions are between buyer and seller. Use at your own risk.

sections.heading: Accounts
sections.body: You are responsible for keeping your account secure. We can suspend accounts that violate site rules or spam the platform.

sections.heading: Products & Orders
sections.body: Product availability and pricing can change at any time. Orders may be canceled or refunded if inventory is unavailable.

sections.heading: Content
sections.body: Do not post illegal, abusive, or unrelated content. We can remove content or disable accounts that violate these rules.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We collect the information you provide when creating an account, placing an order, or submitting a form. We use it to operate the site and communicate with you.

sections.heading: What we do not do
items: Sell your data to third parties
Provide user contact info outside of what you post publicly (e.g., Swap Meet contact info)

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies and local storage for essential site functionality and embedded media preferences.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Questions? Use the contact form on the site.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.intro: We want this site to be usable by as many people as possible.

sections.heading: Our approach
sections.body: We aim to follow common accessibility practices and improve the site over time.

sections.heading: Known limitations
sections.body: Some pages or features may not fully meet accessibility needs yet.

sections.heading: Feedback
sections.body: If you encounter barriers or have suggestions, contact the site owner so we can improve.
